level_signals: Comp range $170K-$250K base, consistent with mid-to-senior IC
Works directly with Founders and Execs on highest-priority strategic and operational challenges
End-to-end ownership of projects including identifying problems and implementing scalable solutions

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Are a past founder, or have ambitions of becoming one in the future
Are a killer operator who thrives in fast-paced environments, has extremely high ownership, and enjoys wearing multiple hats to take on new and ambiguous challenges
Are comfortable owning projects end-to-end, from identifying the problem to implementing scalable solutions
Believe in first-principles thinking: you're extremely good at analyzing problems and using data to inform decisions, optimize processes, and track performance
Are an excellent communicator who can partner with cross-functional teams and influence stakeholders at all levels of the organization
Are passionate about building from the ground up, with a strong bias toward action and intensity

scope.surface: Founder's Office — strategic and operational initiatives across the company
scope.business_model: B2B SaaS, conversational AI platform for enterprise customer experience
primary_metrics_inferred: Business growth metrics as directed by founders/execs
core_responsibilities: Work directly with Founders and Execs to scale the business
Tackle highest-priority strategic and operational challenges
Drive strategic initiatives across the company
Build processes and implement scalable solutions

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and competitive ($170K-$250K base + equity)
Direct access to founders and executives — high visibility role
Broad mandate with high ownership and impact potential
Company is well-funded with top-tier investors (a16z, Accel, Bain Capital Ventures, Coatue, Index Ventures)
Strong customer roster (Cash App, Square, Chime, Oura Health)
red_flags: Full in-office requirement with no city specified — location ambiguity for candidates
Role is extremely broad and ambiguous, which may appeal to some but signals unclear day-to-day scope
No years of experience stated — hard to gauge seniority fit without more structure
Visa sponsorship and work authorization not mentioned
